---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new contract, a contract extension, or a tooling improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what are you proposing and why? -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable? -->

## Proposal

<!-- Describe the change. For contract changes, name the affected interface or domain. -->

## Consumer Impact

<!-- Which consumers would be affected? Is this backward-compatible? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is this preferred? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Architecture notes, related issues, or links to source-repo discussions. -->

---

> **Note:** Contract changes must originate in the source service repository and be proposed
> via `propose-contract.yml`. This issue is for discussion only — not for direct edits to
> `Contracts/`.
